content_of_post_to_comment:
I'm looking for an accountability partner.

The thing is, I've tried having accountability partners before, and I've realized that it doesn't work very well for me when the other person is at the exact same stage as I am. We often end up struggling with the same things, and neither of us really has the perspective to guide the other.

So I'm hoping to find someone who is a few steps ahead of me—someone I can learn from and who can help keep me accountable.

I want to make it clear that I have no intention of dragging anyone down. In fact, I'll do my best to work hard, improve, and rise to their level. I'm not looking for someone to do the work for me; I'm looking for guidance from someone who has already walked a bit further down the path.

I know this post might sound like a kid whining or asking for too much, but I'm being completely genuine. I genuinely want to improve.

So if anyone is willing to help a fellow human who's faaaar behind and trying to catch up, I'd be incredibly grateful if you reached out.

Thank you.

(PS.- I don't mind getting scolded for not doing the things I promised myself I'd do. If I'm making excuses or avoiding what I said I'd work on, feel free to call me out on it. I'd rather hear the truth than stay stuck)

THANK YOU VERY MUCH!
